docs.title: #backend thread
docs.content:
Thread in #backend:
nora: quick heads-up, I started rate-limiting work (RATE-55). nothing blocking yet.
owen: cool, let me know when you need a review.

docs.title: RATE-55: Per-tenant API rate limiting
docs.content:
Issue RATE-55: Implement per-tenant API rate limiting
Status: In Progress
Assignee: nora
Description: Current global 100 rps limit unfairly throttles large enterprise tenants. Need Redis-backed token buckets per customer_id. Also add Retry-After header to 429 responses.

expected_edges.note: Slack message briefly names RATE-55 in passing as a status update, without analyzing or discussing the ticket's content
